_comment: Manual overrides applied AFTER every Sonnet sweep. Source of truth for corrections.
_comment2: Format: card name → path → value. Applied by scripts/apply-overrides.ts

overrides.card: Jace, Vryn's Prodigy // Jace, Telepath Unbound
value: instant or sorcery card in graveyard
overrides.reason: Sonnet used bare 'instant' and 'sorcery' — should be 'instant or sorcery card in graveyard' (his -3 targets cards in graveyard)
